overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a snowy, mountainous ruin area with wooden tribal structures and totem poles. The character approaches a massive Tallneck mechanical creature in the distance, navigates through an enemy camp with wooden fortifications, and discovers a stone campfire at a mountain overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ruins with tribal totem poles

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the ruined settlement, navigating between wooden debris and totem poles

entered.detail: collapsed wooden structure with charred beams and snow-covered roof
tall carved wooden pole with tribal markings and blue accents
large tan and brown rock formations forming the mountain backdrop
massive giraffe-like mechanical creature with circular platform head visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Aloy runs through a wide snowy mountain path surrounded by ruined wooden tribal structures and carved totem poles. The massive Tallneck mechanical creature looms in the distant center background against rocky cliffs, while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: enemy camp with wooden fortifications and barricades

events.description: enemy warriors become visible ahead standing near wooden barricades
character crouches and takes cover behind wooden fortifications, slowing pace

agents.ego_description: approaching enemy positions stealthily, taking cover behind wooden barricades while observing hostile warriors

notable_agents.action: enemy warrior standing guard near the wooden barricade, holding a weapon

entered.detail: crude defensive wall made of stacked logs and wooden planks
tall dilapidated wooden watchtower with broken beams

segments.scene_description: The character enters an enemy camp area with wooden fortifications and barricades. Hostile warriors are visible standing guard in the distance, prompting Aloy to take cover and crouch behind the wooden structures while the Tallneck remains visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky path leading to cave entrance

events.description: exits the enemy camp into a narrower rocky corridor with cliff walls
approaching the dark cave entrance causes the lighting to become dimmer and more shadowed

agents.ego_description: running along the narrowing rocky path toward the cave entrance, leaving the enemy camp behind

entered.detail: dark opening in the rock face with jagged stone edges and shadowed interior
steep rock face with patches of snow and ice

segments.scene_description: Aloy moves through a narrowing rocky corridor flanked by cliff walls, approaching a dark cave entrance ahead. The wooden structures of the enemy camp fade behind as the path becomes more enclosed and the lighting shifts to shadow near the cave mouth.

events.description: character turns right away from the cave entrance and begins ascending the slope
reaching the stone campfire ring at the mountain overlook with panoramic view

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky slope up to the campfire overlook, turning away from the cave entrance

entered.detail: circular arrangement of stones with unlit wood in the center, situated on the overlook
tall wooden structures and towers visible on the distant ridge

segments.scene_description: Aloy turns away from the cave entrance and ascends a rocky slope to a mountain overlook. At the top, a stone campfire ring sits at the center with a panoramic view of the valley below and wooden scaffolding towers visible on the distant ridges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, snowy mountain pass into the claustrophobic confines of a fortified enemy camp. It begins with Aloy running along a wide path flanked by ruined tribal structures and carved totem poles, while a massive Tallneck looms in the distance against a backdrop of rocky cliffs. As the character advances, the open terrain shifts into a guarded outpost filled with wooden fortifications and barricades. The camera then tightens its focus as Aloy crouches for cover behind these structures to avoid the gaze of distant hostile warriors, while the Tallneck remains a constant presence to the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic rocky passage into a wide, elevated mountain vista. It begins with Aloy moving through a narrowing corridor flanked by steep cliff walls, leaving the wooden structures of an enemy camp behind as the path becomes increasingly enclosed. As the camera approaches the deep shadows of a dark cave entrance, the lighting shifts toward gloom before the character turns away from the mouth of the cavern. The scene then opens up as Aloy ascends a rocky slope, climbing toward a high overlook where a stone campfire ring sits at the center. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a panoramic view of the valley below, with wooden scaffolding towers punctuating the distant ridges under an open sky.
